normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 1.6 - Heritage Administration and Procedures
version_date: Adopted 27 August 2025 (Ordinary Meeting of Council, C2508-15)
scope_summary: Sets the City of Fremantle's administrative procedures for heritage management across the Local Planning Scheme No. 4 area: when Heritage Assessments and Heritage Impact Statements are required with development applications, assessment of cultural heritage significance and listing categories (Level 1A/1B, 2, 3), processes for adding/removing places on the Local Heritage Survey or Heritage List (Part 1); criteria triggering archaeological investigations under clause 13B of LPS4 (Part 2); and guidance on varying scheme site/development requirements (height, setbacks, plot ratio, parking) on heritage grounds under clause 12 of the Deemed Provisions, including the required Statement of Justification (Part 3).

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015 (Deemed Provisions, cl 12 and cl 64)
LPP 3.6: Heritage-protected Places Built Form and Land Use
LPP 1.7: Development Exempt from Approval Under Local Planning Scheme No. 4
The Burra Charter - Australia ICOMOS Charter for Places of Cultural Significance

quality_flags: Appendix 1 quick-reference table extracted with interleaved category/requirement columns (readable but misaligned)
